news.title:
Markets rallied for the third session; Nifty ended at 22,968, led by banks.

news.title:

news.title:

news.title:
HDFC Bank reported robust deposit growth, while RBL Bank and AUSFB showed strong performance.
Credit growth is projected at 13-14% this year, with a 14% CAGR over two years.

news.title:

HDFC Bank's LDR falls below 95%, with growth 200–300 bps ahead of system, easing investor concerns.

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.

news.title:
HDFC Bank's Q4 update shows CASA deposits up 12.3% YoY to Rs 10.61 lakh cr.
Shares hit 52-week lows; down 23% in 6 months amid leadership and bond mis-selling issues.
